description: Builders inject only the governance contracts that match the generated agent's task traits. Blanket injection of all 26 contracts is disabled: baseline contracts are always present, trait contracts are added when the trait applies, and the risk tier sets loop_policy plus verification depth (smallest useful package).

cites_sources.reason: Generated claims must carry version-tracked source refs and provenance checks.

handles_customer_or_private_data.reason: PII and confidential corpus chunks need an explicit privacy boundary; private/confidential scopes never leave local paths.

handles_uncertain_information.reason: Low-evidence answers must be marked as estimates or withheld.

performs_external_writes_or_sends.reason: Submission, sending, or publishing requires a human review gate before the side effect.

promotes_memory.reason: Durable memory writes go through Memory Curator candidate tickets (admission control).

long_running_or_stateful.reason: State machines and recovery paths need explicit transition and resilience contracts.

multi_agent_coordination.reason: Team topologies need coordination, context handoff, and incentive contracts.

entity_resolution_or_graph.reason: GraphRAG entity merging needs identity-resolution and alignment rules.

quality_scoring_or_eval.reason: Eval judges and QA gates need valid proxies, assurance cases, and coverage checks.

policy_or_norm_sensitive.reason: Norm- or stakeholder-sensitive outputs need authority-drift and preference governance.

self_evolving.reason: Proposal-first self-evolution needs feedback-stability and causal-impact contracts.

low.note: Simple one-shot tasks: single execution, no loop, token-lean.

medium.note: Complex or long tasks: execute, grade against environment criteria, retry.

high.note: External writes/sends: separate-context verifier must pass, then side-effect-containment human gate. Self-grading is forbidden.
